acceptance_checks.then: releases."1.8.1".digest byte-equals the registry index digest for ghcr.io/rynaro/crystalium:1.8.1, and latest == pins.stable == "1.8.1"
acceptance_checks.verify_method: ghcr anonymous-token registry API (manifests/1.8.1 Docker-Content-Digest) compared to the value parsed back out of roster/mcps.yaml + yq eval / eidolons mcp show crystalium

acceptance_checks.then: releases."0.5.3".digest byte-equals the registry index digest for ghcr.io/rynaro/tonberry:0.5.3, and latest == pins.stable == "0.5.3"
acceptance_checks.verify_method: ghcr anonymous-token registry API (manifests/0.5.3 Docker-Content-Digest) compared to the value parsed back out of roster/mcps.yaml + yq eval / eidolons mcp show tonberry

acceptance_checks.then: it exits 0 (jq empty on schemas/*.json + yq eval on roster/mcps.yaml)

acceptance_checks.given: the nexus CLI against this checkout
acceptance_checks.when: EIDOLONS_NEXUS="$(pwd)" bash cli/eidolons mcp show crystalium and ... mcp show tonberry run
acceptance_checks.then: they report 1.8.1 / 0.5.3 respectively, with the new digests
it stays green — no fixture change, and CRYSTALIUM_PINNED's deliberately-stale S9 drift digest is untouched
